_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: 09:24 UTC tick (8 M15 bar_close all SKIP, no BOS/CHoCH/level touches). level_alerts.note: Break of 0.707 = prior pivot gone. Short on retest from below. SL 0.713, TP 0.700. Risk-off + AUD first-to-bleed. Catalyst HARDENING Apr 21 09:09 UTC: Iran MFA explicit 'no plans to send negotiators' to Islamabad + 'US violated ceasefire from beginning' (Hormuz blockade since Apr 13 + overnight US seizure of Iranian container ship); Vance: '21 hrs talks, no agreement' prior round; Trump: extension 'highly unlikely'. De-escalation tail thinning. T-~15h to ceasefire expiry 00:00 GMT Wed. Level 0.707 still ~1.2% below current 0.7150 — needs the ceasefire cliff to break (or talks-fail confirm). Need M15 bear BOS + rejection wick on retest. Conv 3.

Price 159.1765 (09:24 UTC M15, -6.85p vs 09:09; bearish M15 BOS 103 bars ago intact, bull FVG 159.022-159.115 unmitigated below and approaching). Now 0.27 below 159.45 fade zone (159.45-161.95 per MarketPulse/OANDA). Katayama post-Bessent 'bold action' (JapanTimes Apr 16). No fresh MoF verbal. Fade SELL on entry into zone — needs M15 bear BOS + rejection wick on first touch of 159.45+ for 7-gate. SL 161.00, TP1 158.70, TP2 157.20. Conv 3. 2-WAY RISK: (a) Iran risk-off flip bids yen (ceasefire collapse → yen as funding-unwind safe-haven — this is the path hardening now that Iran refuses Islamabad), (b) Islamabad deal surprise → USD bid but intervention risk caps. Monitor M15 for first touch OR mitigation of 159.02-159.115 bull FVG from above (could trigger re-push into zone).

WTI 87.146 M15 / 87.282 H1 (09:09 UTC, +0.8 vs prior tick 86.364; Brent $95 per Euronews Apr 21 confirms). Bearish M15 BOS 86.621 100 bars ago still intact — no bull BOS yet despite pop. Thesis HARDENING: Iran MFA 'no plans to send negotiators' + 'US violated ceasefire from beginning' (Hormuz blockade since Apr 13 + overnight US container-ship seizure) + Vance 'no agreement after 21 hrs' prior round + Trump extension 'highly unlikely'. De-escalation tail thinning fast. T-~15h to ceasefire expiry 00:00 GMT Wed Apr 22. Break $90 + M15 bull BOS signals collapse fully priced — gap-open on talks-fail + ceasefire collapse plausible. SL 88.00, TP1 94, TP2 98. Conv 4.
